case_title: MAE HUFF VS. NORDICTRACK, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MAE HUFF, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-05-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-20-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LISA SARTO, CSR#8994. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-16-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: ERIC THRONE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: HUFF, MAE 103 THORNTON AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Eric Throne. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Continued To Jun-16-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff appearing in Propria Persona. The OSC is re-set to 6/16/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Continued To Mar-17-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/17/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)
